description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 1/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify agent identity, model aliases, instructions, and generated functions.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Added an explicit generated-helper surface test covering identity, runtime module, result/controls helpers, and absence of removed output/guardrail helper aliases. Existing tests cover model aliases and instruction resolution. Verified format, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.

title: E2: Verify agent identity, model aliases, instructions, and generated functions
